The '''Hapan Embassy''' was the diplomatic mission of the [[Hapes Consortium/Legends|Hapes Consortium]] to the [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances|Galactic Alliance]], and was located on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Legacy of the Force: Inferno]]''
